wedding.date.title: Date & time
wedding.date.planning1: We're still working on the final schedule for the day.
wedding.date.planning2: What we do know is that we'll start in the afternoon and celebrate until midnight, something like: ceremony, dinner, party! Everything takes place on the same beach, so you don't have to worry about transport between different places.

wedding.location.detail: We'll share the exact spot closer to the date.

rsvp.title: Confirm your attendance
rsvp.intro: No form, just send us a message.
rsvp.note.item3: Would you like to join our shuttle bus? Tell us where you're staying and we'll plan a pickup time.
